rooms.label: 39d
rooms.name: Old Forge
rooms.gm_note: Dead forge hides sacks: 1,400 cp, 350 sp, and 120 iron ingots. Seven-thousand-pound rune-carved hammer hangs over the anvil.

rooms.name: Map Room

monsters.name: Revenant
monsters.note: Halleth Garke, trapped in the pit; seeks his three murderers (level 2); ally material

rooms.gm_note: Wall carving of all 23 levels with three voice-buttons (Skullport / Stardock / Halaster’s Tower gate access). Companion: Halleth is a self-expiring ally — use him. Secret door south to 38.

rooms.label: 39c
rooms.name: Goblin Hall
rooms.gm_note: A twentieth goblin lies dead — an argument gone badly.

rooms.name: Fearful Mimicry

monsters.name: Mimic
monsters.note: Large, 75 hp; poses as the south-alcove statue with a fake gold spear

rooms.gm_note: Two genuine elf-warrior statues north; rubble of the original statue behind the mimic.

rooms.name: Secret Tunnel
rooms.gm_note: Hidden curved corridor linking 37 and 39; heavy foot traffic in the dust.

rooms.label: 39b
rooms.name: Bugbear Den

monsters.name: Bugbear
monsters.note: one hosts an intellect devourer; cannot be surprised

rooms.gm_note: Part of Big Ears watch post (3 bugbears, 19 goblins, 2 ettins; a shrieker warns them).

rooms.label: 39a
rooms.name: Hall of the Two-Headed King
rooms.gm_note: Stairs descend 200 ft to level 2. Rotating the statue’s warhammer (DC 15 Perception to notice) reveals a circlet of blasting.

rooms.name: Cracked Ceiling

monsters.name: Stirge
monsters.note: roost in the ceiling fissure; descend on noise or uplifted light

rooms.gm_note: Mining tools in wheelbarrows. Bugbears hunt stirges here for food.
